name: code-scope-highlighter
description: Highlight the scope of matching brackets with customizable colors and flexible highlight modes.

codeScopeHighlighter.scopeColorLight.description: Light Theme: Color for highlighting the entire scope of matching brackets. (Hex format)

codeScopeHighlighter.scopeColorDark.description: Dark Theme: Color for highlighting the entire scope of matching brackets. (Hex format)

codeScopeHighlighter.bracketColorLight.description: Light Theme: Color for highlighting the matching brackets. (Hex format)

codeScopeHighlighter.bracketColorDark.description: Dark Theme: Color for highlighting the matching brackets. (Hex format)

codeScopeHighlighter.matchBrackets.description: Choose when the scope highlight should be active: 'near' for when the cursor is near the bracket, 'always' to always highlight, and 'never' to never highlight.

codeScopeHighlighter.allowCodeBlockHighl.description: When enabled, fall back to code block highlighting when no bracket pairs are detected. Useful for languages like Python and Ruby.

codeScopeHighlighter.highlightCodeBlockL.description: Language IDs (e.g. python, ruby) for which code block highlighting is enabled when allowHighlightIndentation is `on`. See https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/languages/identifiers

scripts.package: pnpm run check-types && pnpm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.compile: pnpm run check-types && pnpm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.pretest: pnpm run compile-tests && pnpm run compile && pnpm run lint
